content_html:
The intelligence layer for AI memory.

Genesys doesn't just remember what happened; it remembers why. A scoring engine + causal graph + lifecycle manager for AI agent memory. Speaks MCP natively.

LoCoMo benchmark (certified)

System Score Protocol
Genesys Memory 85.55 ± 0.37 Frozen: gpt-4o-mini answerer + judge, temp 0, n=1,540, cats 1–4, 10 runs (July 2026)
Zep 75.14 Comparable published setup
Mem0 66.9 Comparable published setup (Mem0 paper)

Self-reported vendor figures above ~90 use different answerers/judges and are not comparable — the oracle retrieval ceiling under this frozen protocol is 94.9. Reproduce it yourself: Astrix-Labs/locomo-harness · full methodology · per-run results.

Hosted product: genesys.astrixlabs.ai — your personal memory for AI, carried across ChatGPT, Claude, and every MCP app · Pricing · Developer docs · Benchmark methodology (85.55 on LoCoMo, certified over 10 runs, receipts published)

What is this

Genesys is a scoring engine, causal graph, and lifecycle manager for AI memory. Memories are scored by a multiplicative formula (relevance × connectivity × reactivation), connected in a causal graph, and actively forgotten when they become irrelevant.

This package (genesys-memory) is the core library: an in-memory causal graph engine with optional JSON persistence, plus a stdio MCP server. It has no database dependency and no REST API. A hosted product built on top of this library — with Postgres, additional storage backends, and a REST/HTTP MCP API — is available separately at genesys-api.astrixlabs.ai; it is not part of this package.

Why

  • Flat memory doesn't scale. Dumping everything into a vector store gives you recall with zero understanding. The 500th memory buries the 5 that matter.
  • No forgetting = no intelligence. Real memory systems forget. Without active pruning, your AI drowns in stale context.
  • No causal reasoning. Vector similarity can't answer "why did I choose X?" — you need a graph.

Your AI remembers everything but understands nothing. Genesys fixes that.

Quick Start

Install the package. The base install has zero database dependencies — state lives in memory and is optionally persisted to a JSON file.

pip install genesys-memory

Optional extras:

pip install 'genesys-memory[openai]'      # OpenAI embeddings
pip install 'genesys-memory[local]'       # Local embeddings (sentence-transformers, no API key)
pip install 'genesys-memory[anthropic]'   # LLM-based causal inference (consolidation, contradiction detection)

Run the stdio MCP server directly:

python3 -m genesys_memory

From source

git clone https://github.com/Astrix-Labs/genesys.git
cd genesys
pip install -e '.[dev]'
pytest tests/

Connect to your AI

Claude Code

claude mcp add genesys -- python -m genesys_memory

Claude Desktop

Add to your claude_desktop_config.json:

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "genesys": {
      "command": "python",
      "args": ["-m", "genesys_memory"]
    }
  }
}

Reliability & retries

The stdio server is a single local process. Under load — or during a restart or redeploy of a hosted transport in front of it — a tool call can transiently fail or the connection can briefly go unresponsive. Memory writes and reads are not worth crashing an agent turn over, so clients should degrade gracefully rather than treat a memory call as fatal:

  • The server degrades gracefully too: a tool exception (or a missing required argument) is returned as a structured {"error": "...", "retryable": bool} payload instead of a protocol-level MCP failure, so a memory hiccup never crashes the transport. The retryable flag encodes the guidance below — true only for read tools.
  • Retry idempotent reads (memory_recall, memory_search, memory_traverse, memory_explain, memory_stats) with a short bounded backoff (e.g. 2–3 attempts). These have no side effects worth worrying about beyond reactivation bookkeeping.
  • Do not blindly retry memory_store / memory_amend on an ambiguous timeout — a silent success followed by a retry creates a duplicate node. Prefer to continue the turn and reconcile on the next memory_recall, or pass a stable source_session so duplicates are easy to spot.
  • Treat memory as best-effort context, not a hard dependency. If a call fails, proceed with whatever context you already have and try again next turn rather than aborting. The graph is durable; a missed write is recoverable, a crashed agent turn is not.

MCP Tools

Tool Description
memory_store Store a new memory. Use related for writer-specified typed edges ({id, type}); related_to is legacy and always creates caused_by. Optional category. May return possible_conflicts (heuristic hints).
memory_amend Record a correction: creates a new memory that supersedes an existing one. The old memory is kept (decayed in recall), not deleted.
memory_recall Recall memories by natural language query (vector + keyword + graph spreading activation). Supports verbosity: "concise" for lightweight payloads.
memory_search Filtered vector search by status, category, date (since), last-active date (active_since), or entity. Pass an empty query to enumerate by recency instead (no embedder needed) — with since/active_since this answers "what's new since I last looked" without knowing what to query for.
memory_traverse Walk the causal graph from a node. Returns reachable nodes and the edges of the induced subgraph (source/target/type/weight/created_by) — a superset of the BFS tree, so paths can be reconstructed. Honors edge_types.
memory_explain Explain a memory's score. Includes a score_model block (formula + live per-force breakdown + staleness note) and removal_impact.
memory_stats Get memory system statistics
pin_memory Pin a memory so it's never forgotten
unpin_memory Unpin a previously pinned memory
delete_memory Permanently delete a memory
list_core_memories List core memories, optionally filtered by category
set_core_preferences Set user preferences for core memory categories
promote_to_org Promote a private memory to org visibility

Writer-specified edges & corrections

memory_store's related argument lets the writer set edge semantics instead of guessing. Each entry is {"id": "<node-id>", "type": "<edge-type>"}, directed new_node --type--> target (so supersedes means the new node supersedes the target). Invalid types are rejected before the node is created — explicit writes never half-succeed. related_to still exists but always creates caused_by; prefer related.

To correct a fact, use memory_amend(node_id, content, reason=...): it stores the new version, links it SUPERSEDES → old, and keeps the old memory for audit. Recall automatically deprioritizes superseded hits and tags them with superseded_by.

When you memory_store something that lexically disagrees with an auto-link candidate (a changed number, a negation), the result may include possible_conflicts — heuristic hints, not verified contradictions, and never materialized as edges. Use them to decide whether to memory_amend.

Concise recall

memory_recall(query, verbosity="concise") skips the causal-chain enrichment and returns only id / summary / status / score / activation / is_core (plus superseded_by when set) per hit — much cheaper on tokens for high-frequency lookups. verbosity="full" (the default) is unchanged. Reactivation writes still occur in both modes (they are governed by read_only, not verbosity).

See docs/scoring.md for what activation / decay_score actually mean — in short, it is a retention weight that rises when a memory is recalled, not a countdown to deletion.

How it works

Every memory is scored by three forces multiplied together:

decay_score = relevance × connectivity × reactivation
  • Relevance decays over time. Old memories fade unless reinforced.
  • Connectivity rewards memories with many causal links. Hub memories survive.
  • Reactivation boosts memories that keep getting recalled. Frequency matters.

Because the formula is multiplicative, a memory must score on all three axes to survive. A highly connected but never-accessed memory still decays. A frequently recalled but causally orphaned memory still fades.

decay_score (aliased activation on every hit) is a retention weight, not a deletion countdown — recalling a memory raises it, and a low score just means "resting," not "doomed." Deletion requires a low score and orphaned and unpinned and non-core and non-org, all at once. See docs/scoring.md for the full model and worked numbers.

STORE → ACTIVE → DORMANT → FADING → PRUNED
           ↑                    │
           └── reactivation ────┘
                                  (only if score=0, orphan, not pinned)

Memories can also be promoted to core status — structurally important memories that are auto-pinned and never pruned.

Benchmark Results

We've run internal evaluations against the LoCoMo long-conversation memory benchmark during development. These are self-reported, run with our own harness (category 5 — adversarial questions with disputed ground truth — excluded), and not independently reproduced, so treat them as directional rather than a verified claim. Reproduction scripts are in benchmarks/ if you want to run your own numbers.

Storage backend

This package ships one storage backend: an in-memory causal graph (storage/memory.py) with optional JSON persistence via GENESYS_PERSIST_PATH. No database is required.

Additional backends — Postgres/pgvector, FalkorDB, MongoDB, and an Obsidian vault adapter — along with a REST API, OAuth, and multi-user auth, are part of the hosted product at genesys-api.astrixlabs.ai and are not included in this repo.

Want a different storage backend for the open-source library? Implement the provider protocols in storage/base.py and bring your own.

Configuration

Copy .env.example to .env and set:

Variable Required Description
OPENAI_API_KEY Unless GENESYS_EMBEDDER=local Embeddings
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY No Enables LLM-based causal inference (consolidation, contradiction detection). Off by default — without it, causal edges only come from edges the caller explicitly declares in memory_store plus cosine-similarity linking.
GENESYS_EMBEDDER No openai (default) or local (sentence-transformers, no API key)
GENESYS_PERSIST_PATH No JSON file path to persist state across restarts (in-memory otherwise)
GENESYS_USER_ID No Default user ID for single-tenant mode

Auto-link tuning

Auto-linking connects a newly stored memory to semantically similar existing memories. If it is too permissive you get a "hairball" — everything ends up ~2 hops from everything, which destroys traversal scoping. Three knobs bound it:

Variable Default Description
GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MIN_SIMILARITY embedder-recommended Cosine floor to create an auto-link. Explicit value wins over the embedder default.
GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MAX_EDGES 3 Max auto-links a single memory_store may create. Caps fan-out.
GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MAX_NODE_DEGREE 10 Max auto_link edges any single node may accumulate as a target. Fan-out alone still lets a hub gain one edge per store forever; this caps the hub itself.

The floor is embedder-aware: an auto-link is permanent graph structure, so its floor sits above the transient recall floor. When GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MIN_SIMILARITY is unset, the effective floor is the embedder's recommendation — 0.6 for OpenAI (text-embedding-3-small, whose genuine matches cluster ~0.5+) and 0.45 for local sentence-transformers (whose genuine matches cluster ~0.2–0.4 but whose noise pairs have been observed at ~0.44, so only near-duplicate content auto-links locally). Any unknown embedder falls back to 0.45. Auto-linking also de-dupes: if a pair is already connected by any edge (e.g. a user_explicit caused_by), no parallel auto_link related_to is created.

The possible_conflicts hint on memory_store scans with its own, lower floor (GENESYS_CONFLICT_MIN_SIMILARITY, defaulting to the recall floor) over a wider window (GENESYS_CONFLICT_SCAN_K, default 8) — so tightening the auto-link floor never shrinks conflict detection.

Recall / relevance floors

The same embedder-aware pattern governs recall filtering:

Variable Default Description
GENESYS_RECALL_MIN_SIMILARITY embedder-recommended (OpenAI 0.5 / other 0.2) Cosine floor below which pure vector hits are dropped from memory_recall. Keyword hits bypass it.
GENESYS_CORE_INJECT_MIN_SIMILARITY embedder-recommended (OpenAI 0.45 / other 0.2) Floor for injecting auto-promoted core memories into recall results. Pinned memories are always injected.

Scoring knobs

The three-force scoring formula and its lifecycle thresholds are all env-configurable (see engine/config.py and docs/scoring.md): GENESYS_ACTR_DECAY, GENESYS_RELEVANCE_VECTOR_WEIGHT, GENESYS_RELEVANCE_KEYWORD_WEIGHT, GENESYS_MIN_CONNECTIVITY, GENESYS_FORGETTING_THRESHOLD, the GENESYS_DORMANCY_* transition thresholds, and the GENESYS_CORE_* promotion weights.

See .env.example for all options.

Built by

Genesys is built by Rishi Meka at Astrix Labs. It came out of frustration with re-explaining project context to Claude every session. The goal is the intelligence layer between your LLM and your memory — fully open source.

Contributing

See CONTRIBUTING.md.

License

AGPL-3.0-or-later

Note: Genesys releases prior to v0.3.6 were documented as Apache 2.0 in error. The LICENSE file has always contained the AGPLv3 text. From v0.3.6 onward, all documentation correctly references AGPL-3.0-or-later with a Contributor License Agreement.

sentences.en: What is this
sentences.zh: 这是什么

blocks.html_en: Genesys is a scoring engine, causal graph, and lifecycle manager for AI memory. Memories are scored by a multiplicative formula (relevance × connectivity × reactivation), connected in a causal graph, and actively forgotten when they become irrelevant.

sentences.en: Genesys is a scoring engine, causal graph, and lifecycle manager for AI memory.
sentences.zh: Genesys 是 AI 内存的评分引擎、因果图和生命周期管理器。

sentences.en: Memories are scored by a multiplicative formula (relevance × connectivity × reactivation), connected in a causal graph, and actively forgotten when they become irrelevant.
sentences.zh: 记忆通过乘法公式（相关性×连通性×重新激活）进行评分，以因果图的形式连接起来，当它们变得无关紧要时，就会主动遗忘。

blocks.html_en: This package (genesys-memory) is the core library: an in-memory causal graph engine with optional JSON persistence, plus a stdio MCP server. It has no database dependency and no REST API. A hosted product built on top of this library — with Postgres, additional storage backends, and a REST/HTTP MCP API — is available separately at genesys-api.astrixlabs.ai; it is not part of this package.

sentences.en: This package (genesys-memory) is the core library: an in-memory causal graph engine with optional JSON persistence, plus a stdio MCP server.
sentences.zh: 该包 (genesys-memory) 是核心库：一个具有可选 JSON 持久性的内存因果图引擎，以及一个 stdio MCP 服务器。

sentences.en: It has no database dependency and no REST API.
sentences.zh: 它没有数据库依赖性，也没有 REST API。

sentences.en: A hosted product built on top of this library — with Postgres, additional storage backends, and a REST/HTTP MCP API — is available separately at genesys-api.astrixlabs.ai; it is not part of this package.
sentences.zh: 基于该库构建的托管产品（带有 Postgres、附加存储后端和 REST/HTTP MCP API）可在 Genesys-api.astrixlabs.ai 上单独获取；它不是这个包的一部分。

blocks.html_en: • Flat memory doesn't scale. Dumping everything into a vector store gives you recall with zero understanding. The 500th memory buries the 5 that matter.

sentences.en: Flat memory doesn't scale.
sentences.zh: 平面内存无法扩展。

sentences.en: Dumping everything into a vector store gives you recall with zero understanding.
sentences.zh: 将所有内容转储到矢量存储中可以让您以零理解的方式回忆。

sentences.en: The 500th memory buries the 5 that matter.
sentences.zh: 第 500 个记忆埋葬了重要的 5 个记忆。

blocks.html_en: • No forgetting = no intelligence. Real memory systems forget. Without active pruning, your AI drowns in stale context.

sentences.en: No forgetting = no intelligence.
sentences.zh: 没有遗忘=没有智慧。

sentences.en: Real memory systems forget.
sentences.zh: 真正的记忆系统会忘记。

sentences.en: Without active pruning, your AI drowns in stale context.
sentences.zh: 如果没有主动修剪，你的人工智能就会淹没在陈旧的环境中。

blocks.html_en: • No causal reasoning. Vector similarity can't answer "why did I choose X?" — you need a graph.

sentences.en: No causal reasoning.
sentences.zh: 没有因果推理。

sentences.en: Vector similarity can't answer "why did I choose X?" — you need a graph.
sentences.zh: 向量相似度无法回答“为什么我选择X？” ——你需要一张图表。

blocks.html_en: Your AI remembers everything but understands nothing. Genesys fixes that.

sentences.en: Your AI remembers everything but understands nothing.
sentences.zh: 你的人工智能会记住一切，但什么也不理解。

sentences.en: Genesys fixes that.
sentences.zh: Genesys 解决了这个问题。

sentences.en: Reliability & retries
sentences.zh: 可靠性和重试

blocks.html_en: The stdio server is a single local process. Under load — or during a restart or redeploy of a hosted transport in front of it — a tool call can transiently fail or the connection can briefly go unresponsive. Memory writes and reads are not worth crashing an agent turn over, so clients should degrade gracefully rather than treat a memory call as fatal:

sentences.en: The stdio server is a single local process.
sentences.zh: stdio 服务器是一个本地进程。

sentences.en: Under load — or during a restart or redeploy of a hosted transport in front of it — a tool call can transiently fail or the connection can briefly go unresponsive.
sentences.zh: 在负载下，或者在重新启动或重新部署其前面的托管传输期间，工具调用可能会暂时失败，或者连接可能会短暂无响应。

sentences.en: Memory writes and reads are not worth crashing an agent turn over, so clients should degrade gracefully rather than treat a memory call as fatal:
sentences.zh: 内存写入和读取不值得让代理崩溃，因此客户端应该优雅地降级，而不是将内存调用视为致命的：

blocks.html_en: • The server degrades gracefully too: a tool exception (or a missing required argument) is returned as a structured {"error": "...", "retryable": bool} payload instead of a protocol-level MCP failure, so a memory hiccup never crashes the transport. The retryable flag encodes the guidance below — true only for read tools.

sentences.en: The server degrades gracefully too: a tool exception (or a missing required argument) is returned as a structured {"error": "...", "retryable": bool} payload instead of a protocol-level MCP failure, so a memory hiccup never crashes the transport.
sentences.zh: 服务器也会优雅地降级：工具异常（或缺少必需的参数）作为结构化的 {"error": "...", "retryable": bool} 有效负载返回，而不是协议级 MCP 故障，因此内存中断永远不会导致传输崩溃。

sentences.en: The retryable flag encodes the guidance below — true only for read tools.
sentences.zh: 可重试标志对以下指南进行编码——仅适用于读取工具。

blocks.html_en: • Retry idempotent reads (memory_recall, memory_search, memory_traverse, memory_explain, memory_stats) with a short bounded backoff (e.g. 2–3 attempts). These have no side effects worth worrying about beyond reactivation bookkeeping.

sentences.en: Retry idempotent reads (memory_recall, memory_search, memory_traverse, memory_explain, memory_stats) with a short bounded backoff (e.g. 2–3 attempts).
sentences.zh: 使用短有界退避（例如 2-3 次尝试）重试幂等读取（memory_recall、memory_search、memory_traverse、memory_explain、memory_stats）。

sentences.en: These have no side effects worth worrying about beyond reactivation bookkeeping.
sentences.zh: 除了重新激活簿记之外，这些没有值得担心的副作用。

blocks.html_en: • Do not blindly retry memory_store / memory_amend on an ambiguous timeout — a silent success followed by a retry creates a duplicate node. Prefer to continue the turn and reconcile on the next memory_recall, or pass a stable source_session so duplicates are easy to spot.

sentences.en: Do not blindly retry memory_store / memory_amend on an ambiguous timeout — a silent success followed by a retry creates a duplicate node.
sentences.zh: 不要在不明确的超时时盲目地重试 memory_store / memory_amend - 静默成功后重试会创建重复节点。

sentences.en: Prefer to continue the turn and reconcile on the next memory_recall, or pass a stable source_session so duplicates are easy to spot.
sentences.zh: 更愿意继续轮流并在下一次内存调用时进行协调，或者传递一个稳定的源会话，以便很容易发现重复项。

blocks.html_en: • Treat memory as best-effort context, not a hard dependency. If a call fails, proceed with whatever context you already have and try again next turn rather than aborting. The graph is durable; a missed write is recoverable, a crashed agent turn is not.

sentences.en: Treat memory as best-effort context, not a hard dependency.
sentences.zh: 将内存视为尽力而为的上下文，而不是硬依赖。

sentences.en: If a call fails, proceed with whatever context you already have and try again next turn rather than aborting.
sentences.zh: 如果调用失败，请继续使用已有的上下文，并在下一轮重试，而不是中止。

sentences.en: The graph is durable; a missed write is recoverable, a crashed agent turn is not.
sentences.zh: 图表持久；丢失的写入是可恢复的，而崩溃的代理轮次则不可恢复。

sentences.en: Writer-specified edges & corrections
sentences.zh: 作者指定的边缘和修正

blocks.html_en: memory_store's related argument lets the writer set edge semantics instead of guessing. Each entry is {"id": "<node-id>", "type": "<edge-type>"}, directed new_node --type--> target (so supersedes means the new node supersedes the target). Invalid types are rejected before the node is created — explicit writes never half-succeed. related_to still exists but always creates caused_by; prefer related.

sentences.en: memory_store's related argument lets the writer set edge semantics instead of guessing.
sentences.zh: memory_store 的相关参数让编写者设置边缘语义而不是猜测。

sentences.en: Each entry is {"id": "<node-id>", "type": "<edge-type>"}, directed new_node --type--> target (so supersedes means the new node supersedes the target).
sentences.zh: 每个条目都是 {"id": "<node-id>", "type": "<edge-type>"}，定向 new_node --type--> target （因此 supersedes 意味着新节点取代目标）。

sentences.en: Invalid types are rejected before the node is created — explicit writes never half-succeed.
sentences.zh: 在创建节点之前，无效类型会被拒绝——显式写入永远不会成功一半。

sentences.en: related_to still exists but always creates caused_by; prefer related.
sentences.zh: related_to仍然存在，但总是创建caused_by；更喜欢相关的。

blocks.html_en: To correct a fact, use memory_amend(node_id, content, reason=...): it stores the new version, links it SUPERSEDES → old, and keeps the old memory for audit. Recall automatically deprioritizes superseded hits and tags them with superseded_by.

sentences.en: To correct a fact, use memory_amend(node_id, content, reason=...): it stores the new version, links it SUPERSEDES → old, and keeps the old memory for audit.
sentences.zh: 要纠正事实，请使用 memory_amend(node_id, content, Reason=...)：它存储新版本，将其链接 SUPERSEDES → 旧版本，并保留旧内存以供审核。

sentences.en: Recall automatically deprioritizes superseded hits and tags them with superseded_by.
sentences.zh: 召回会自动降低被取代点击的优先级，并用 superseded_by 标记它们。

blocks.html_en: When you memory_store something that lexically disagrees with an auto-link candidate (a changed number, a negation), the result may include possible_conflicts — heuristic hints, not verified contradictions, and never materialized as edges. Use them to decide whether to memory_amend.

sentences.en: When you memory_store something that lexically disagrees with an auto-link candidate (a changed number, a negation), the result may include possible_conflicts — heuristic hints, not verified contradictions, and never materialized as edges.
sentences.zh: 当您内存存储在词汇上与自动链接候选者不一致的内容（更改的数字、否定）时，结果可能包括可能的冲突 - 启发式提示，未经验证的矛盾，并且从未具体化为边缘。

sentences.en: Use them to decide whether to memory_amend.
sentences.zh: 使用它们来决定是否进行内存修改。

sentences.en: Concise recall
sentences.zh: 简洁回忆

blocks.html_en: memory_recall(query, verbosity="concise") skips the causal-chain enrichment and returns only id / summary / status / score / activation / is_core (plus superseded_by when set) per hit — much cheaper on tokens for high-frequency lookups. verbosity="full" (the default) is unchanged. Reactivation writes still occur in both modes (they are governed by read_only, not verbosity).

sentences.en: memory_recall(query, verbosity="concise") skips the causal-chain enrichment and returns only id / summary / status / score / activation / is_core (plus superseded_by when set) per hit — much cheaper on tokens for high-frequency lookups.
sentences.zh: memory_recall(query, verbosity="concise") 跳过因果链丰富，每次命中仅返回 id / 摘要 / 状态 / 分数 / 激活 / is_core （加上设置时的 superseded_by ） - 对于高频查找来说，令牌便宜得多。

sentences.en: verbosity="full" (the default) is unchanged.
sentences.zh: verbosity="full"（默认值）未更改。

sentences.en: Reactivation writes still occur in both modes (they are governed by read_only, not verbosity).
sentences.zh: 重新激活写入仍然在两种模式下发生（它们由 read_only 控制，而不是详细程度）。

blocks.html_en: See docs/scoring.md for what activation / decay_score actually mean — in short, it is a retention weight that rises when a memory is recalled, not a countdown to deletion.

sentences.en: See docs/scoring.md for what activation / decay_score actually mean — in short, it is a retention weight that rises when a memory is recalled, not a countdown to deletion.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 docs/scoring.md 了解activation/decay_score的实际含义——简而言之，它是回忆时增加的保留权重，而不是删除的倒计时。

sentences.en: How it works
sentences.zh: 它是如何运作的

blocks.html_en: Every memory is scored by three forces multiplied together:

sentences.en: Every memory is scored by three forces multiplied together:
sentences.zh: 每个记忆都由三个力相乘来评分：

blocks.html_en: • Relevance decays over time. Old memories fade unless reinforced.

sentences.en: Relevance decays over time.
sentences.zh: 相关性随着时间的推移而减弱。

sentences.en: Old memories fade unless reinforced.
sentences.zh: 旧的记忆除非得到强化，否则就会逐渐消失。

blocks.html_en: • Connectivity rewards memories with many causal links. Hub memories survive.

sentences.en: Connectivity rewards memories with many causal links.
sentences.zh: 连接性通过许多因果联系奖励记忆。

sentences.en: Hub memories survive.
sentences.zh: 中心记忆得以保存。

blocks.html_en: • Reactivation boosts memories that keep getting recalled. Frequency matters.

sentences.en: Reactivation boosts memories that keep getting recalled.
sentences.zh: 重新激活可以增强不断被唤起的记忆。

sentences.en: Frequency matters.
sentences.zh: 频率很重要。

blocks.html_en: Because the formula is multiplicative, a memory must score on all three axes to survive. A highly connected but never-accessed memory still decays. A frequently recalled but causally orphaned memory still fades.

sentences.en: Because the formula is multiplicative, a memory must score on all three axes to survive.
sentences.zh: 因为公式是乘法，所以记忆必须在所有三个轴上得分才能生存。

sentences.en: A highly connected but never-accessed memory still decays.
sentences.zh: 高度连接但从未访问过的记忆仍然会衰退。

sentences.en: A frequently recalled but causally orphaned memory still fades.
sentences.zh: 经常被回忆起来但因因果关系而孤立的记忆仍然会消失。

blocks.html_en: decay_score (aliased activation on every hit) is a retention weight, not a deletion countdown — recalling a memory raises it, and a low score just means "resting," not "doomed." Deletion requires a low score and orphaned and unpinned and non-core and non-org, all at once. See docs/scoring.md for the full model and worked numbers.

sentences.en: decay_score (aliased activation on every hit) is a retention weight, not a deletion countdown — recalling a memory raises it, and a low score just means "resting," not "doomed."
sentences.zh: Decay_score（每次点击时的别名激活）是一个保留权重，而不是删除倒计时——回忆记忆会提高它，低分只意味着“休息”，而不是“注定”。

sentences.en: Deletion requires a low score and orphaned and unpinned and non-core and non-org, all at once.
sentences.zh: 删除需要低分、孤立、取消固定、非核心和非组织，一次性全部删除。

sentences.en: See docs/scoring.md for the full model and worked numbers.
sentences.zh: 有关完整模型和有效数字，请参阅 docs/scoring.md。

blocks.html_en: Memories can also be promoted to core status — structurally important memories that are auto-pinned and never pruned.

sentences.en: Memories can also be promoted to core status — structurally important memories that are auto-pinned and never pruned.
sentences.zh: 记忆也可以提升到核心状态——结构上重要的记忆会被自动固定并且永远不会被修剪。

sentences.en: Benchmark Results
sentences.zh: 基准测试结果

blocks.html_en: We've run internal evaluations against the LoCoMo long-conversation memory benchmark during development. These are self-reported, run with our own harness (category 5 — adversarial questions with disputed ground truth — excluded), and not independently reproduced, so treat them as directional rather than a verified claim. Reproduction scripts are in benchmarks/ if you want to run your own numbers.

sentences.en: We've run internal evaluations against the LoCoMo long-conversation memory benchmark during development.
sentences.zh: 我们在开发过程中针对 LoCoMo 长对话内存基准进行了内部评估。

blocks.html_en: The floor is embedder-aware: an auto-link is permanent graph structure, so its floor sits above the transient recall floor. When GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MIN_SIMILARITY is unset, the effective floor is the embedder's recommendation — 0.6 for OpenAI (text-embedding-3-small, whose genuine matches cluster ~0.5+) and 0.45 for local sentence-transformers (whose genuine matches cluster ~0.2–0.4 but whose noise pairs have been observed at ~0.44, so only near-duplicate content auto-links locally). Any unknown embedder falls back to 0.45. Auto-linking also de-dupes: if a pair is already connected by any edge (e.g. a user_explicit caused_by), no parallel auto_link related_to is created.

content_html_zh:
AI 记忆的智能层。

Genesys 不仅会记住发生的事情，还会记住发生的事情。它记得为什么。 用于 AI 代理内存的评分引擎 + 因果图 + 生命周期管理器。 母语为 MCP。

LoCoMo 基准测试（已认证）

系统 Score 协议
创惟内存 85.55 ± 0.37 冻结：gpt-4o-mini 应答器 + 法官，临时 0，n=1,540，猫 1–4，10 次运行（2026 年 7 月）
Zep 75.14 可比较的已发布设置
Mem0 66.9 可比较的已发布设置（Mem0 论文）

超过 90 的供应商自我报告数字使用不同的回答者/评委，并且不具有可比性 - 在该冻结协议下的预言机检索上限为 94.9。 自己复制：Astrix-Labs/locomo-harness · 完整的方法 · 每次运行的结果。

托管产品：genesys.astrixlabs.ai — 您对 AI 的个人记忆，涵盖 ChatGPT、Claude 和每个 MCP 应用程序 · 定价 · 开发人员文档 · 基准方法（LoCoMo 上 85.55，经过 10 次运行认证，已发布收据）

这是什么

Genesys 是 AI 内存的评分引擎、因果图和生命周期管理器。 记忆通过乘法公式（相关性×连通性×重新激活）进行评分，以因果图的形式连接起来，当它们变得无关紧要时，就会主动遗忘。

该包 (genesys-memory) 是核心库：一个具有可选 JSON 持久性的内存因果图引擎，以及一个 stdio MCP 服务器。 它没有数据库依赖性，也没有 REST API。 基于该库构建的托管产品（带有 Postgres、附加存储后端和 REST/HTTP MCP API）可在 Genesys-api.astrixlabs.ai 上单独获取；它不是这个包的一部分。

Why

  • 平面内存无法扩展。 将所有内容转储到矢量存储中可以让您以零理解的方式回忆。 第 500 个记忆埋葬了重要的 5 个记忆。
  • 没有遗忘=没有智慧。 真正的记忆系统会忘记。 如果没有主动修剪，你的人工智能就会淹没在陈旧的环境中。
  • 没有因果推理。 向量相似度无法回答“为什么我选择X？” ——你需要一张图表。

你的人工智能会记住一切，但什么也不理解。 Genesys 解决了这个问题。

快速入门

安装软件包。 基本安装具有零数据库依赖性 - 状态存在于内存中，并且可以选择保存到 JSON 文件。

pip install genesys-memory

可选附加功能：

pip install 'genesys-memory[openai]'      # OpenAI embeddings
pip install 'genesys-memory[local]'       # Local embeddings (sentence-transformers, no API key)
pip install 'genesys-memory[anthropic]'   # LLM-based causal inference (consolidation, contradiction detection)

直接运行stdio MCP服务器：

python3 -m genesys_memory

从源头

git clone https://github.com/Astrix-Labs/genesys.git
cd genesys
pip install -e '.[dev]'
pytest tests/

连接到您的人工智能

克劳德·科德

claude mcp add genesys -- python -m genesys_memory

克劳德桌面

添加到您的 claude_desktop_config.json：

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "genesys": {
      "command": "python",
      "args": ["-m", "genesys_memory"]
    }
  }
}

可靠性和重试

stdio 服务器是一个本地进程。 在负载下，或者在重新启动或重新部署其前面的托管传输期间，工具调用可能会暂时失败，或者连接可能会短暂无响应。 内存写入和读取不值得让代理崩溃，因此客户端应该优雅地降级，而不是将内存调用视为致命的：

  • 服务器也会优雅地降级：工具异常（或缺少必需的参数）作为结构化的 {"error": "...", "retryable": bool} 有效负载返回，而不是协议级 MCP 故障，因此内存中断永远不会导致传输崩溃。 可重试标志对以下指南进行编码——仅适用于读取工具。
  • 使用短有界退避（例如 2-3 次尝试）重试幂等读取（memory_recall、memory_search、memory_traverse、memory_explain、memory_stats）。 除了重新激活簿记之外，这些没有值得担心的副作用。
  • 不要在不明确的超时时盲目地重试 memory_store / memory_amend - 静默成功后重试会创建重复节点。 更愿意继续轮流并在下一次内存调用时进行协调，或者传递一个稳定的源会话，以便很容易发现重复项。
  • 将内存视为尽力而为的上下文，而不是硬依赖。 如果调用失败，请继续使用已有的上下文，并在下一轮重试，而不是中止。 图表持久；丢失的写入是可恢复的，而崩溃的代理轮次则不可恢复。

MCP 工具

Tool 描述
内存存储 储存新的记忆。 使用相关的作者指定的类型边缘（{id，type}）； related_to 是遗留的，并且总是创建 Cause_by。 可选类别。 可能返回 possible_conflicts （启发式提示）。
内存修改 记录更正：创建一个新的内存来取代现有的内存。 旧的记忆被保留（在回忆中衰减），而不是被删除。
记忆回忆 通过自然语言查询（向量+关键词+图扩散激活）回忆记忆。 支持冗长：对于轻量级有效负载来说“简洁”。
内存搜索 按状态、类别、日期（自）、上次活动日期 (active_since) 或实体过滤矢量搜索。 传递一个空查询来按新近度枚举（不需要嵌入器）——使用since/active_since，这会回答“自我上次查看以来的新内容”，而不知道要查询什么。
内存遍历 从节点开始遍历因果图。 返回可达节点和导出子图的边 (source/target/type/weight/created_by) — BFS 树的超集，因此可以重建路径。 尊重边缘类型。
记忆解释 解释一下记忆的分数。 包括 Score_model 块（公式 + 实时每部队细分 + 陈旧性注释）和removal_impact。
内存统计 获取内存系统统计信息
引脚内存 固定记忆，使其永远不会忘记
取消固定内存 取消固定以前固定的内存
删除内存 永久删除记忆
核心记忆列表 列出核心内存，可选择按类别过滤
设置核心首选项 设置核心内存类别的用户首选项
推广到组织 将私人记忆提升为组织可见性

作者指定的边缘和修正

memory_store 的相关参数让编写者设置边缘语义而不是猜测。 每个条目都是 {"id": "<node-id>", "type": "<edge-type>"}，定向 new_node --type--> target （因此 supersedes 意味着新节点取代目标）。 在创建节点之前，无效类型会被拒绝——显式写入永远不会成功一半。 related_to仍然存在，但总是创建caused_by；更喜欢相关的。

要纠正事实，请使用 memory_amend(node_id, content, Reason=...)：它存储新版本，将其链接 SUPERSEDES → 旧版本，并保留旧内存以供审核。 召回会自动降低被取代点击的优先级，并用 superseded_by 标记它们。

当您内存存储在词汇上与自动链接候选者不一致的内容（更改的数字、否定）时，结果可能包括可能的冲突 - 启发式提示，未经验证的矛盾，并且从未具体化为边缘。 使用它们来决定是否进行内存修改。

简洁回忆

memory_recall(query, verbosity="concise") 跳过因果链丰富，每次命中仅返回 id / 摘要 / 状态 / 分数 / 激活 / is_core （加上设置时的 superseded_by ） - 对于高频查找来说，令牌便宜得多。 verbosity="full"（默认值）未更改。 重新激活写入仍然在两种模式下发生（它们由 read_only 控制，而不是详细程度）。

请参阅 docs/scoring.md 了解activation/decay_score的实际含义——简而言之，它是回忆时增加的保留权重，而不是删除的倒计时。

它是如何运作的

每个记忆都由三个力相乘来评分：

decay_score = relevance × connectivity × reactivation
  • 相关性随着时间的推移而减弱。 旧的记忆除非得到强化，否则就会逐渐消失。
  • 连接性通过许多因果联系奖励记忆。 中心记忆得以保存。
  • 重新激活可以增强不断被唤起的记忆。 频率很重要。

因为公式是乘法，所以记忆必须在所有三个轴上得分才能生存。 高度连接但从未访问过的记忆仍然会衰退。 经常被回忆起来但因因果关系而孤立的记忆仍然会消失。

Decay_score（每次点击时的别名激活）是一个保留权重，而不是删除倒计时——回忆记忆会提高它，低分只意味着“休息”，而不是“注定”。 删除需要低分、孤立、取消固定、非核心和非组织，一次性全部删除。 有关完整模型和有效数字，请参阅 docs/scoring.md。

STORE → ACTIVE → DORMANT → FADING → PRUNED
           ↑                    │
           └── reactivation ────┘
                                  (only if score=0, orphan, not pinned)

记忆也可以提升到核心状态——结构上重要的记忆会被自动固定并且永远不会被修剪。

基准测试结果

我们在开发过程中针对 LoCoMo 长对话内存基准进行了内部评估。 这些是自我报告的，使用我们自己的工具运行（第 5 类 - 具有争议的基本事实的对抗性问题 - 排除），并且不是独立复制的，因此将它们视为定向而不是经过验证的主张。 如果您想运行自己的数字，则复制脚本位于基准/中。

存储后端

该软件包附带一个存储后端：内存中因果图 (storage/memory.py)，通过 GENESYS_PERSIST_PATH 具有可选的 JSON 持久性。 不需要数据库。

其他后端 — Postgres/pgvector、FalkorDB、MongoDB 和 ObsidianVault 适配器 — 以及 REST API、OAuth 和多用户身份验证，是 Genesys-api.astrixlabs.ai 托管产品的一部分，不包含在本存储库中。

想要为开源库使用不同的存储后端吗？ 在 storage/base.py 中实现提供者协议并自带您自己的协议。

配置

将 .env.example 复制到 .env 并设置：

多变的 必需的 描述
OPENAI_API_KEY 除非 GENESYS_EMBEDDER=local 嵌入
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY No 启用基于 LLM 的因果推理（合并、矛盾检测）。 默认情况下关闭 - 如果没有它，因果边仅来自调用者在 memory_store 中显式声明的边加上余弦相似度链接。
GENESYS_EMBEDDER No openai（默认）或本地（句子转换器，无 API 密钥）
GENESYS_PERSIST_PATH No 用于在重新启动后保留状态的 JSON 文件路径（否则在内存中）
GENESYS_USER_ID No 单租户模式的默认用户 ID

自动链接调整

自动链接将新存储的记忆连接到语义相似的现有记忆。 如果它太宽松，你会得到一个“毛团”——所有东西最终都会从所有东西开始~2跳，这会破坏遍历范围。 三个旋钮将其固定：

多变的 默认 描述
GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MIN_SIMILARITY 嵌入器推荐 余弦地板创建自动链接。 显式值胜过嵌入器默认值。
GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MAX_EDGES 3 单个内存存储可以创建的最大自动链接数。 帽扇出。
GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MAX_NODE_DEGREE 10 任何单个节点可以作为目标累积的最大 auto_link 边缘。 单独的扇出仍然可以让集线器永远为每个存储获得一个优势；这限制了集线器本身。

该楼层是嵌入器感知的：自动链接是永久图形结构，因此其楼层位于瞬态召回楼层之上。 当 GENESYS_AUTOLINK_MIN_SIMILARITY 未设置时，有效下限是嵌入器的建议 — OpenAI 为 0.6（text-embedding-3-small，其真实匹配集群 ~0.5+），本地句子转换器为 0.45（其真实匹配集群 ~0.2-0.4，但在 ~0.44 观察到其噪声对，因此只有接近重复的内容在本地自动链接）。 任何未知的嵌入器都会回落至 0.45。 自动链接还可以消除重复：如果一对已经通过任何边缘连接（例如 user_explicit Cause_by），则不会创建并行的 auto_link related_to。

memory_store 上的 possible_conflicts 提示使用其自己的较低层（GENESYS_CONFLICT_MIN_SIMILARITY，默认为召回层）在更宽的窗口（GENESYS_CONFLICT_SCAN_K，默认为 8）上进行扫描 - 因此收紧自动链接层永远不会缩小冲突检测。

召回率/相关性楼层

相同的嵌入器感知模式控制召回过滤：

多变的 默认 描述
GENESYS_RECALL_MIN_SIMILARITY 嵌入器推荐（OpenAI 0.5 / 其他 0.2） 余弦下限，低于该下限的纯向量命中将从内存调用中删除。 关键字点击会绕过它。
GENESYS_CORE_INJECT_MIN_SIMILARITY 嵌入器推荐（OpenAI 0.45 / 其他 0.2） 用于将自动提升的核心记忆注入召回结果的底层。 固定的记忆总是被注入。

评分旋钮

三力评分公式及其生命周期阈值都是可环境配置的（请参阅engine/config.py和docs/scoring.md）：GENESYS_ACTR_DECAY、GENESYS_RELEVANCE_VECTOR_WEIGHT、GENESYS_RELEVANCE_KEYWORD_WEIGHT、GENESYS_MIN_CONNECTIVITY、GENESYS_FORGETTING_THRESHOLD、GENESYS_DORMANCY_*转换阈值和 GENESYS_CORE_* 提升权重。

有关所有选项，请参阅 .env.example。
